articles.title: US government takes $2 billion equity stake in nine quantum computing firms
articles.content: Beneficiaries include startup backed by firm with links to the Trump family.
articles.titleZh: 美国政府获得9家量子计算公司20亿美元股权
articles.contentZh: 受益者包括与特朗普家族有联系的公司支持的创业公司。

articles.title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
articles.content: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 42 months earlier, is fixed.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌发布威胁数百万Chromium用户的漏洞代码
articles.contentZh: 在修复42个月前报告的补丁之前， Google发布了漏洞利用代码。

articles.title: In stunning display of stupid, secret CISA credentials found in public GitHub repo
articles.content: SSH keys, plaintext passwords, other sensitive data had been up since November 2025.
articles.titleZh: 在公共GitHub存储库中发现令人惊叹的愚蠢秘密CISA凭据
articles.contentZh: SSH密钥、明文密码和其他敏感数据自2025年11月以来一直在上升。

articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Samsung’s memory chip employees negotiated $340,000 bonuses this year
articles.content: Details have emerged about a tentative deal struck between Samsung and semiconductor employees who had threatened to strike. The deal reportedly makes some workers eligible for average annual bonuses of $340,000. The proposed 18-day strike had hinged on Samsung's bonus cap for employees in the semiconductor division and followed a substantial rise in the possible […]
articles.titleZh: 三星内存芯片员工今年协商34万美元奖金
articles.contentZh: 三星和威胁要罢工的半导体员工之间达成的初步协议的细节已经浮出水面。据报道，这笔交易使一些工人有资格获得平均年度奖金$ 340,000。拟议的18天罢工取决于三星对半导体部门员工的奖金上限，随后可能的[…]大幅增加。

articles.title: Microsoft’s consumer marketing chief to leave next year
articles.content: Yusuf Mehdi, executive vice president and consumer chief marketing officer at Microsoft, is leaving the company after 35 years. Mehdi announced his departure in an internal memo on Thursday, noting that he will leave Microsoft next year. He will remain focused on marketing for Windows, Copilot for consumers and the Microsoft 365 consumer business until […]
articles.titleZh: 微软消费者营销主管明年离职
articles.contentZh: 微软执行副总裁兼消费者首席营销官Yusuf Mehdi将在35年后离开公司。Mehdi周四在一份内部备忘录中宣布了他的离职，并指出他将于明年离开微软。他将继续专注于Windows、面向消费者的Copilot和Microsoft 365消费者业务的营销，直到[…]
